Sleep

Why sleep is your most powerful health lever

5 min · Dagnara Health

There's nothing more straightforwardly pleasing than a good night's sleep. Yet for so many of us, it's a rarity. Dagnara's sleep module isn't just about keeping tabs on quality.

With regular tracking, it builds better sleep hygiene and bedtime routines. It identifies patterns and helps you optimise your entire day around your energy levels.

34%
more steps on days following 8h+ sleep — based on your last 14 data points

What Dagnara tracks

Every morning, your two-tap check-in logs sleep duration and quality. After two weeks, patterns surface. You'll see exactly which bedtime habits are working — and which ones are quietly robbing you of deep rest.

1.8 pts
average mood drop on days following less than 6 hours of sleep

The cross-module engine connects sleep to everything: activity, nutrition, mood, hydration. Sleep isn't just one metric — it's the multiplier for everything else.

Nutrition

You've set your goals — now track what matters

4 min · Dagnara Health

You've set your goals, but how are you going to make sure you hit them? The answer is tracking. There are modules to log almost every aspect of your health — and they're not just for the data nerds among us (although, they do satisfy us greatly).

Recording your sleep, steps, and calories pushes you to stay on track. But it can also help you understand your own body better — at a level most apps never surface.

--
your daily calorie goal — mapped across breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snack

Beyond the calorie count

Multiple studies show logging food helps you stay on track. Dagnara goes further — it maps your protein, carbs, and fat in real time, then connects nutrition to your mood scores, energy, and sleep quality.

When you're consistently 18% under your calorie goal, Dagnara notices before you do — and shows you exactly which meal is missing.

Module Status
// SYSTEM LOG
STREAKS

What are streaks?

A streak is the number of days in a row you've tracked food in the app. Your streak starts at zero and increases by one for each day you track.

Why are streaks important?

It can be hard to get things going on your journey toward a healthier lifestyle. With streaks, you are reminded to track food every day so you can take charge of your daily routines and eventually form lasting, healthy habits.

How do Dagnara streaks work?

A streak begins when you track a meal or just a single food item in your Diary.

For each day that you track food in the app, the streak will increase by one. If you miss one day, the streak resets to zero.

Dagnara tracks which days you log food based on your Diary entries — no manual action needed.

Note that if you are sick, forgot to track or for any other reason did not track one day, you can go back in time, add food to that day in the Diary, and continue your streak.

The science of deep sleep

Help & Support
Search help articles...
💬
Contact support
[email protected] · Usually replies in 24h
Getting started
How do I log my first meal?›
Go to the Diary tab and tap any meal row (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner or Snack). The food logger opens — search for a food or browse by category. Tap the + button to add it. Your calorie ring updates instantly.
How is my calorie goal calculated?›
Your goal uses the Mifflin-St Jeor equation based on your weight, height, age, sex and activity level. It adjusts automatically — lose weight = −500 kcal, gain = +300 kcal, maintain = maintenance. Update your details in Profile → Personal Details anytime.
Can I change my goal after setup?›
Yes. Go to Profile → Goal Settings and tap Edit Goal. You can switch between Lose Weight, Maintain and Gain Muscle at any time. Your calorie target recalculates immediately.
Food & nutrition tracking
How do I log water intake?›
Tap the water drop icon on the Diary home screen to add a glass. You can also tap the FAB (+ button) and choose Water. Your daily water goal and glass size can be customised in Settings → Goals → Water intake.
How do I adjust my macros?›
Open Settings → Goals → Calorie goal, then scroll to Macronutrients. Drag the sliders for Carbs, Protein and Fat — they must add up to 100%. Your macro targets update in real time across the app.
Can I skip a meal?›
Yes — tap the skip icon on any meal row in the Diary. Skipped meals are marked and excluded from your daily totals. Tap again to unskip. Note: you cannot skip a meal that already has logged items.
How do I delete a logged food?›
Tap the meal row to expand it, then tap the × icon next to any food item to remove it. The calorie ring updates immediately.
Sleep, mood & activity
How do I log sleep?›
Tap the Sleep module on the Diary screen, or use the FAB → Sleep. Set your bedtime and wake time using the drum-wheel picker, then choose your sleep quality (1–5 stars) and tap Save.
What is the Life Score?›
The Life Score (0–100) is a weekly composite of your sleep, nutrition, hydration, activity and mood. Take the test from the Progress tab → Life Score card. It updates each time you complete the assessment and gives insight-driven suggestions to improve.
How do I log steps?›
Open the Move panel (tap the running icon on the Diary screen, or FAB → Activity). Use the quick-add buttons (+1k, +2k, +5k, +8k, +10k steps) or type a custom value. Your step total is saved to the daily diary.
Account & data
Will my data be lost if I clear the browser?›
Dagnara stores data in your browser's localStorage. Clearing browser data or cache will erase your diary history. Your account profile (name, goals, weight) is stored in the app's user database — reinstalling or re-logging-in restores your profile automatically.
How do I reset my password?›
On the login screen tap "Forgot?" next to the password field. A reset link will be sent to your registered email address. If you're already logged in, go to Privacy & Security → Change password.
How do I delete my account?›
Go to Settings → Privacy & Security → Delete account. Read the confirmation carefully — this permanently removes your account and all stored data. This action cannot be undone.
Troubleshooting
The app feels slow or unresponsive›
Try a hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R / Cmd+Shift+R). If using as a PWA on iPhone, remove and re-add to Home Screen. If the issue persists, export your data first, then clear app data from browser settings and re-login — your profile restores automatically.
My data isn't saving between sessions›
This usually happens when the browser is in Private/Incognito mode — localStorage is disabled there. Use a regular browser window. Also check that your browser allows localStorage for this site under Privacy settings.
The calorie ring shows wrong numbers›
Make sure your calorie goal is set correctly in Settings → Goals → Calorie goal. If the displayed goal says "—", log out and back in — your calorie goal will recalculate from your profile. If the problem continues, tap the goal number to force-recalculate.
